site.heroSubtitle: Official website of জালপাই গণেশ পূজা কমিটি / Jalpai Ganesh Puja Committee. Puja updates, activities, gallery photos, member ID verification, location, and contact details.

aboutHeading: Organized with unity, respect, and devotion.
aboutIntro: জালপাই গণেশ পূজা কমিটি / Jalpai Ganesh Puja Committee brings people together through puja arrangement, cultural participation, social support, and community connection.

about.title: Puja Arrangement
about.text: Clean and respectful puja planning for devotees and visitors.

about.title: Cultural Program
about.text: Festival moments, local participation, and community memories.

about.title: Community Unity
about.text: Members and supporters working together with respect and devotion.

activities.title: Prasad Distribution
activities.text: Respectful distribution for visitors and community members.

events.description: Main puja, aarti, and bhog distribution.
